{{CargoRelic
|name=Saturday Star
|class_id=20175
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Fortune Law 7: Maintaining anticipation for every weekend is a good way to enhance your luck!
|fame=14
|art=32
|fth=13
|civ=15
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail DEF +1<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail DEF +2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail DEF +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail DEF +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss7=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail DEF +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400<br> (Awakened)
}}
